prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. Copy exact request evidence for semantic choices. Use only supplied identifiers. Return JSON only.

{"request_text":"Para el trabajo de inventory control, reúna las fuentes, compruebe su calidad y conserve el resultado final a largo plazo con garantía estándar en JSON estructurado.","evidence_spans":{"e0":"Para el trabajo de inventory control","e1":"reúna las fuentes","e2":"compruebe su calidad","e3":"conserve el resultado final a largo plazo","e4":"garantía estándar","e5":"JSON estructurado"},"catalog":{"capabilities":[{"capability_id":"v08-p36-prepare","name":"Assemble inventory control source packet","description":"Collect the source material needed for inventory control.","aliases":["gather inventory control inputs","prepare inventory control packet","gather the inputs","prepare the inventory control packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":[],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["source_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p36-source"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p36-verify","name":"Validate inventory control source packet","description":"Check the assembled inventory control material for correctness.","aliases":["check inventory control inputs","verify inventory control packet","check the packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":["v08-p36-prepare"],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["source_bundle"],"output_modes":["checked_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p36-checked"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p36-deliver","name":"Publish inventory control verified brief","description":"Release the checked final brief for inventory control.
